problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
